message:
fix: improve toast notification contrast and visibility (#3259) (#3263)

Increase background opacity, border contrast, and text brightness on all
toast types so success/error/warning/info notifications are clearly
readable against the dark UI background. Add shadow-lg for additional
visual prominence.

Co-authored-by: andy anderson <andy@andys-MacBook-Pro.local>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
